$comment: Frozen reliability baselines per reviewer × family × bucket.
v1 ships with placeholder zeros — the harness's stub mode does NOT
compute real F1; live-mode wiring (v1.1) populates these values.
CI gate (per the plan, Pillar 9): F1 drop > 5 points OR per-bucket
success-rate drop > 10 points → fail. Rebaseline via
`npm run eval:swarm:rebaseline` with a commit subject prefixed
BASELINE-CHANGE: explaining the intentional metric change.
